calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Estate Proceedings.
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt for Abigail Glynn.

Mr. Huysentruyt had nothing to add. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
